    C

    calculateFinalPoints(Player) - Method in class it.polimi.Buildings.EndGame_Builder_Add
    Calculates the final points for the given player based on their builder characters.
    calculateFinalPoints(Player) - Method in class it.polimi.Buildings.Endgame_Effect
    Calculates the final points for the given player, adding the bonus if targets are satisfied.
    Card - Class in it.polimi.Abstract
    Base class for every card in the game, storing era and board position.
    Card() - Constructor for class it.polimi.Abstract.Card
    Default constructor required by JSON deserialization.
    Card(Era, Position) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Abstract.Card
    Creates a card with the given era and position.
    CardLoader - Class in it.polimi.Game.Core
    Loads cards and offer tiles from the JSON resources bundled with the application.
    CardLoader() - Constructor for class it.polimi.Game.Core.CardLoader
     
    CardLoader.BuildingsData - Class in it.polimi.Game.Core
    Container used by Jackson to map the buildings.json structure.
    CardLoader.CharactersData - Class in it.polimi.Game.Core
    Container used by Jackson to map the characters.json structure.
    CardLoader.EventsData - Class in it.polimi.Game.Core
    Container used by Jackson to map the events.json structure.
    CardLoader.OfferTilesData - Class in it.polimi.Game.Core
    Container used by Jackson to map the offer_tiles.json structure.
    CardLoader.TurnOrderTrackRule - Class in it.polimi.Game.Core
    Rule applied when a player returns to a turn-order track slot.
    CardNode - Class in it.polimi.Network.Client
    A custom JavaFX component representing a game card on the table.
    CardNode(int, String, Runnable) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Network.Client.CardNode
    Creates a new CardNode.
    CardNode(int, String, Runnable, double) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Network.Client.CardNode
    Creates a new CardNode with a custom width.
    Character - Class in it.polimi.Abstract
    Base class for all character cards.
    Character(Era, int, Position, CharacterType) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Abstract.Character
    Creates a character card for the given era, player count, position, and type.
    CharactersData() - Constructor for class it.polimi.Game.Core.CardLoader.CharactersData
     
    CharacterType - Enum Class in it.polimi.Constants
    Defines the various types of characters available in the game.
    checkPassword(String) - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.GameRoom
    Validates the provided password.
    CheckRmi - Class in it.polimi.Network.Tools
    Small command-line utility that checks whether the RMI binding is reachable.
    CheckRmi() - Constructor for class it.polimi.Network.Tools.CheckRmi
     
    chooseOfferTile(Player, OfferTile) - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.Game
    Assigns the chosen offer tile to the player while keeping it visible in the offer track.
    ClientCallbackRemote - Interface in it.polimi.Network.RMI
    RMI callback exposed by the client so the server can push asynchronous updates.
    ClientConnection - Interface in it.polimi.Network.Server
    Common abstraction for any connected client endpoint (Socket, RMI, ...).
    ClientGuiMain - Class in it.polimi.Network.Client
    JavaFX-based GUI client for Mesos with Multi-Scene Navigation.
    ClientGuiMain() - Constructor for class it.polimi.Network.Client.ClientGuiMain
     
    ClientHandler - Class in it.polimi.Network.Server
    Handles a single client connection on the server side.
    ClientHandler(Socket, Lobby) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Network.Server.ClientHandler
    Constructs a new handler for a connected client.
    ClientMain - Class in it.polimi.Network.Client
    The main entry point for the Mesos client application.
    ClientMain() - Constructor for class it.polimi.Network.Client.ClientMain
     
    ClientThread - Class in it.polimi.Network.Client
    A background thread dedicated to asynchronously listening for incoming messages from the server.
    ClientThread(BufferedReader) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Network.Client.ClientThread
    Constructs a new ClientThread.
    ClientThread(BufferedReader, ConsoleTuiRenderer, Consumer) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Network.Client.ClientThread
    Constructs a new ClientThread with custom rendering and update observation.
    Color - Enum Class in it.polimi.Constants
    Represents the distinct colors that can be assigned to players.
    configureLobby(String, int) - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.GameController
    Configures room-level lobby constraints received from the network layer.
    containsPlayer(String) - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.GameRoom
    Checks if the player is already registered in this room.
    createRoom(int, String, int) - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.Lobby
    Creates a new game room.
    createRoom(int, String, String, int) - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.Lobby
    Creates a new game room.
